product_highlights: Silicone-Free Blur — natural alternative to silicone-based soft-focus agents
VIVAPUR® microcrystalline cellulose for texture and consistency
Biodegradable and naturally derived texture solutions
Comprehensive range of scrubs, rheology modifiers, sensory improvers, and fillers
notes: JRS Personal Care is a German specialty ingredient supplier with a strong focus on natural, cellulose-based texture modifiers. Their Silicone-Free Blur product is a natural alternative to silicone-based soft-focus agents, delivering comparable sensory performance with a sustainable, biodegradable profile that meets growing consumer demand for silicone-free formulations. JRS's VIVAPUR® microcrystalline cellulose range is widely used as a filler, disintegrant, and texture modifier in cosmetic formulations.
